added.title: The Scoop
added.description: The Titans find it odd when Starfire becomes friends with an ice cream scoop.

added.title: Chicken in the Cradle
added.description: Beast Boy neglects his responsibilities, leaving the other Titans to raise his baby chick.

added.title: Kabooms Part 1
added.description: The Titans are excited to see the movie version of their favorite show "Babies vs Dogs".

added.title: Kabooms Part 2
added.description: Inspired by the "Babies vs Dogs" movie, the Titans decide to make a big Hollywood film of their own.

added.title: Tower Renovation
added.description: Following the destruction of their Tower by Slade, the Titans go house hunting.

added.title: Off The Hook
added.description: Things get scary when campers are pulled into a fishhook challenge that pits them against each other AND their worst fears.

added.title: Soar Losers
added.description: Only 3 campers remain and if any of them live through the final challenge they might win the 1 million dollars Chris promised them. But on Total Drama Island promises are a lot like bones; they're often broken.

added.title: Meet the Victims
added.description: Chris welcomes 16 new campers back to the original island and divides them into two teams who face-off in a blindfolded challenge that's sure to cause pain.

added.title: Pirates of the Cabbagean
added.description: Our two teams go to war, firing cabbages from cannons at each other from their respective pirate ships. The first team to sink the other will be the winner, but someone takes a very personal interest in one specific target.

added.title: Drown Town Abbey
added.description: Each team has a member placed into a clear glass tank that is locked and slowly filling with water. In order to free them, they must retrieve the codes at the far end of a very dangerous obstacle course.

added.title: Bear Lift
added.description: To help raise money to save Darrell's store, the Bears use the stack as a taxi through a ride share app.

added.title: The Nom Nom Show
added.description: Things go awry while Nom Nom shoots his first television show. The Bears offer to help and appear on the show.

added.title: Ice Cave
added.description: Ralph takes over the cave and turns it into a snowy fortress where he reigns as king over the Bears and Charlie.

added.title: Spa Day
added.description: The Bears have a relaxing day at the spa. Grizz tries to get everything the spa has to offer. Panda gets trapped in the steam room with an old man. And Ice Bear plays ping pong.

added.title: Charlie's Halloween Thing
added.description: Charlie hosts an evening of spooky stories starring the Bears.

added.title: Carmageddon
added.description: Duncan is rattled when Chef, tired of having his car destroyed, buys a new one that is completely indestructible.

added.title: Funhouse
added.description: The Tennysons find themselves stuck inside an inescapable funhouse constructed by Zombozo; Ben goes alien and fights for escape, ultimately proving that behind every illusion, there's a disappointing secret.

added.title: Summer Breakers
added.description: After Grandpa Max's super smart buddy Phil discovers that a second extraterrestrial item crashed alongside the Omnitrix, Team Tennyson sets off to find the second crash site before someone else does but arrive instead to find nefarious newcomer Breaker One-Nine has already beat them to the punch.

added.title: Queen of Bees
added.description: Ben, Gwen and Grandpa Max arrive in Bismarck, North Dakota for its annual celebration of bee pollination, bringing them face-to-face with Queen Bee and a bold new scheme, forcing Ben to conquer his new fear of bees!

added.title: Gentle Ben
added.description: Grandpa Max's alma mater asks him to use the Omni-Copter to transport an important exhibit to an exotic nature reserve, but when the exhibit turns out to be a rare and very large baby moth, Ben must keep Tim Buktu from stealing the moth while learning that sometimes you need to use finesse and not force to solve hard problems.

added.title: Love Letters
added.description: Steven and Connie help Jamie the mailman with love.

added.title: Reformed
added.description: Steven, Amethyst and Garnet chase after a monster that's been loose in the Temple.

added.title: Sworn to the Sword
added.description: Connie trains with Pearl to be a swordfighter.

added.title: Rising Tides, Crashing Skies
added.description: Ronaldo does some investigative reporting on whether Steven and the Crystal Gems are safe for Beach City.

added.title: Keeping It Together
added.description: Steven and the Crystal Gems revisit the Kindergarten and find a dark secret.

added.title: The Box Prince
added.description: Finn meets the Box Prince and discovers the Box Kingdom has been taken over by an imposter. Now, Finn must help the real Box Prince reclaim his rightful throne.

added.title: Red Starved
added.description: Finn, Jake and Marceline are trapped in an underground cavern with no red in sight. If Marceline doesn't feed, she will turn into a vampiric beast and suck out all of Jake's blood! Finn heads off to explore the cave and find something red to satiate her until they can be rescued.

added.title: The Pit
added.description: Kee-Oth the Blood Demon has kidnapped Jake, taken him back to his dimension and thrown him in a pit. If Finn wants to rescue his friend, he's going to need Lady Rainicorn's help and a videotape that will reveal how to open the portal to Kee-Oth's dimension.

added.title: Sad Sax
added.description: Mordecai wants to get back together with C.J.

added.title: Park Managers' Lunch
added.description: The park guys want to make sure Benson gets back safe from his lunch with Gene.

added.title: Mordecai and Rigby Down Under
added.description: Mordecai and Rigby have to catch a flight to the USA.

added.title: Married and Broke
added.description: Muscle Man and Starla want to win a game show to pay for their wedding.

added.title: I See Turtles
added.description: Eileen and the gang want to see baby sea turtles hatch and go into the ocean.

added.title: Black Hole
added.description: Panda's creative genius knows no limits! Too bad his brothers can't seem to appreciate that. If only Panda could find someone who's truly on his level, and who finally gets him. But maybe some things are best left unimagined?

added.title: Play Date
added.description: Sick and tired of babysitting Ice King while the Ice Kingdom is being rebuilt, Finn and Jake call up an old friend to hang out with their annoying houseguest, Abracadaniel.

added.title: We Fixed a Truck
added.description: Finn finds an old truck, and Jake calls Banana Man to help with the repairs. When BMO stays up all night working on the truck, he hears on a spooky radio talk show that Princess Bubblegum is a reptilian replicant.

added.title: Batcomputer for a Day
added.description: When Batcomputer shuts down for a system update, the other Batwheels must take over for her while aiding Batman in a battle against Harley Quinn.

added.title: The Monsters in Your Head
added.description: Ben and Gwen learn a rumor of an alien invasion happening at the park they are camping at, but when they investigate, they discover a preserve containing a host of mutated creatures engineered by Animo! With the unexpected help of Kevin 11 and his family, Ben proves that the rumors are false, and that truth is stranger than fiction!

added.title: Clay Date
added.description: Clayface, Gotham City's messiest villain, arrives to cause trouble during Gotham's annual Clean Up Day. Redbird must overcome his fear of taking baths if he's going to help Bam bring Clayface to justice.

added.title: K-9: Space Puppy
added.description: Marvin the Martian hires The Looney Builders to build a doghouse on Mars for his puppy, K-9. Daffy soon bonds with K-9 and comes up with a plan to prolong their playtime.

added.title: Out of the Cheer Zone
added.description: Two mischievous Whiffle kids come to play with Dibble, forcing Cheer to put her important work on hold to manage them. When she finds her "managing kids" skills lacking and her important work in jeopardy, she uses her skills as a leader to get the kids working as a team to help her complete her work while having fun at the same time.

removed.title: Bermuda Baby Bears
removed.description: Farah and the bears uncover the secrets of the Bermuda Triangle.

removed.title: Dungeon Train
removed.description: Finn and Jake discover a train where every car is a dungeon filled with a new foe for Finn to fight. Jake gets bored and wants to leave, but Finn is having the best time and doesn't want to leave ever!

removed.title: Think About Your Future
removed.description: The Titans are reckless with their money and health, much to the detriment of their future selves.

removed.title: Pure Protein
removed.description: Still shipwrecked on a desert island, the Titans first hold a team competition but then must avoid an alien hunter.

removed.title: The Art of Ninjutsu
removed.description: The other Titans train Beast Boy in the ways of the ninja.

removed.title: Coconut Cream Pie
removed.description: The Titans are shipwrecked on a desert island and must use the island's resources to survive.

removed.title: Open Door Policy
removed.description: Still shipwrecked on a desert island, the Titans try to find food but stumble upon dinosaurs instead.

removed.title: Horror Club
removed.description: Steven goes to the lighthouse to watch scary movies with Ronaldo, Lars and Sadie.

removed.title: Maximum Capacity
removed.description: A garage sale reunites Greg and Amethyst with their favorite cheesy sitcom - Lil' Butler.

removed.title: Marble Madness
removed.description: Steven and the Gems encounter another droid from space.

removed.title: Winter Forecast
removed.description: Steven has to get Connie home before it snows.

removed.title: Rose's Scabbard
removed.description: Steven joins Pearl on a special mission to a place that belonged to Rose-Quartz.

removed.title: Private Lake
removed.description: When the local lake is overcrowded with tourists, the Bears have fun at Charlie's private lake.

removed.title: Panda's Art
removed.description: Panda paints a portrait of Charlie and it's a hit with his art class. But after an art dealer offers to buy the painting, Panda has to get it back from Charlie.

removed.title: The Fair
removed.description: The Baby Bears make a deal with a carnival worker to be prizes for a game of ball toss.

removed.title: Lucy's Brother
removed.description: To impress Lucy Panda offers to babysit her brother, Clifford. But Clifford turns out to be too high maintenance for Panda to handle.

removed.title: Poppy Rangers
removed.description: Ranger Tabes leads a troop of young girls into a cave expedition, and brings Grizz as their cave expert.

removed.title: Magma Cum Laude
removed.description: This is it! Today one of the 3 remaining campers will become a millionaire. The only thing standing in their way is 2 other campers, a forest, some lava, some violent goats, a mountain, and vomit. Other than that, pretty easy.

removed.title: Caved by the Bell
removed.description: The final 4 get must wander through a dark and spooky cave hunting for coins. The challenge only gets worse when they discover that something is also hunting them.

removed.title: The Truth, The Pole Truth and Nothing But the Truth
removed.description: If spending the day balancing on a pole under the direct sun with no food in your tummy sounds like a fun time you are going to love today's challenge.

removed.title: The Pink Painter Strikes Again
removed.description: They're baaaaack! All 16 Campers from Season One return for more spills, thrills and dramaaaaa! And a very special guest arrives on the island to really mess things up. Hope everyone packed an extra pair of pants!

removed.title: Tortoise Rigamortis
removed.description: With just 5 campers remaining things are getting tense. So today is just about having fun taking selfies with wild animals. Everyone had their rabies shot?

removed.title: One Last Job
removed.description: Jake Jr. gets mixed up with some bad eggs and Jake has to reunite with his old gang for one last job to save him.

removed.title: Another Five More Short Graybles
removed.description: Why are Finn and Jake building a time machine? Can Princess Bubblegum help Cinnamon Bun conquer his fear of the dark?

removed.title: The Party's Over, Isla de Senorita
removed.description: His kidnapping scheme foiled again for like the millionth time, Ice King decides he's had enough.

removed.title: Wizards Only, Fools
removed.description: Princess Bubblegum believes magic is nothing but a bunch of hooey. When Starchy gets sick and asks her to use magic to cure him, she asks Finn and Jake to help her sneak into Wizard City to get a cold spell.

removed.title: Candy Streets
removed.description: Lumpy Space Princess is robbed and faints before she can tell Finn and Jake who robbed her.

removed.title: Tent Trouble
removed.description: Mordecai and Rigby must replace CJ's expensive tent before she realizes they destroyed it.

removed.title: Bachelor Party! Zingo!
removed.description: Skips must plan the perfect bachelor party for his cousin, Quips.

removed.title: Skips in the Saddle
removed.description: Skips wants to start dating again.

removed.title: Take the Cake
removed.description: Mordecai and Rigby have to deliver a cake to Maellard's birthday party.

removed.title: Thomas Fights Back
removed.description: Thomas Wants to get the park founder's statue back.
